predicate.title: agent-activity/v1: capture agent active working time as evidence
predicate.problem: roadmap-priority-4-agent-cycle-time redefines cycle time as the agent's active working time, but transcripts are not committed, so active time is unrecoverable after the fact; usage.py already parses per-message transcript timestamps and discards them — they must be sessionized and captured as evidence at collection time, the same argument that produced the token metric
acceptance_criteria: spec/predicates/agent-activity.v1.schema.json exists, extends statement.base.schema.json, and is auto-discovered by check.py

bindings/claude-code/usage.py sessionizes all timestamped transcript events in the change window (gap > idle threshold closes a span, --idle-threshold default 300) and emits evidence/activity.json alongside the usage statements
this CR's own evidence carries the first activity.json, valid against the new schema, with active_seconds below the wall-clock window
